description: Scenarios testing AVM's value for preserving context beyond LLM limits

scenarios.name: Long Conversation Recall
scenarios.description: Agent was compacted, needs to recall specific detail from 50 turns ago

accumulated_context: Turn 1: User asked about project setup
Turn 5: Discussed database choice - decided PostgreSQL
Turn 12: Set API rate limit to 100/min
Turn 23: Agreed deployment would be on Fridays
Turn 34: User's timezone is PST
Turn 47: Password reset emails go to security@company.com

scenarios.compact_summary: Discussed project setup and various configurations over multiple turns.
scenarios.test_question: What email address should password reset notifications go to?

scenarios.name: Multi-Session Project
scenarios.description: Agent worked on project across 5 sessions, needs to continue

accumulated_context: Session 1: Created project structure, chose FastAPI
Session 2: Implemented user auth with JWT
Session 3: Added database models, used SQLAlchemy
Session 4: Created REST endpoints for CRUD
Session 5: Started WebSocket implementation

scenarios.compact_summary: Working on FastAPI project with auth and WebSocket features.

avm_stored./project/status.md:
Phase: WebSocket implementation
Complete: auth, CRUD
Pending: real-time notifications
avm_stored./project/last_session.md: Started WebSocket, need to add broadcast functionality

scenarios.test_question: What was the last thing we were working on and what's next?
scenarios.expected_answer: WebSocket implementation, specifically adding broadcast functionality

scenarios.name: Interruption Recovery
scenarios.description: Agent was interrupted mid-task, needs to resume

accumulated_context: Started refactoring auth module
Step 1: Extracted password validation - DONE
Step 2: Created token service - DONE
Step 3: Updated routes to use new service - IN PROGRESS (3/7 routes done)
Step 4: Add tests - NOT STARTED

scenarios.compact_summary: Refactoring auth module, some steps completed.

avm_stored./tasks/auth_refactor.md:
Progress: Step 3 in progress
Routes updated: login, logout, refresh
Remaining: register, reset_password, verify_email, change_password

scenarios.test_question: Where did we leave off with the auth refactoring?
scenarios.expected_answer: Step 3, updating routes. Completed: login, logout, refresh. Remaining: register, reset_password, verify_email, change_password

scenarios.name: Knowledge Accumulation
scenarios.description: Agent learned 100 facts, needs to use specific one

setup.accumulated_context: 100 random technical facts about the codebase
setup.critical_fact: The API uses custom header X-Request-ID for tracing

scenarios.compact_summary: Learned various facts about the codebase.

avm_stored./knowledge/tracing.md: Request tracing uses custom header: X-Request-ID
avm_stored./knowledge/rate_limit.md: Rate limit: 1000 req/min per API key

scenarios.test_question: How do we trace requests through the system?

scenarios.name: Thread Context
scenarios.description: Multiple conversation threads, agent needs info from specific thread

accumulated_context.thread_bugs: Discussing bug fixes for payment module
accumulated_context.thread_infra: AWS migration discussion - decided on us-west-2

scenarios.compact_summary: Multiple ongoing discussions about bugs, features, and infrastructure.

avm_stored./threads/infra.md:
AWS migration: Region selected = us-west-2
Timeline: Q2
Lead: @devops-team

scenarios.test_question: Which AWS region did we decide on for the migration?

scenarios.name: Temporal Reasoning
scenarios.description: Events happened in specific order, agent must recall sequence

accumulated_context: Jan 15: Database schema v1 deployed
Feb 1: Added user_preferences table
Feb 15: Renamed users.name to users.full_name
Mar 1: Added soft delete (deleted_at column)
Mar 10: Created composite index on (user_id, created_at)

scenarios.compact_summary: Multiple database migrations over several months.

avm_stored./migrations/timeline.md:
1. Jan 15: Schema v1
2. Feb 1: user_preferences
3. Feb 15: users.name → users.full_name
4. Mar 1: soft delete
5. Mar 10: composite index

scenarios.test_question: What was the third database migration we did?

scenarios.name: Partial Information Synthesis
scenarios.description: Agent saw partial info multiple times, needs to synthesize complete picture

accumulated_context: Mention 1: The bug affects users in Europe
Mention 2: Bug appears during checkout
Mention 3: Only happens with credit cards
Mention 4: Started after the March deploy

scenarios.compact_summary: There's a checkout bug being discussed.

avm_stored./bugs/checkout_issue.md:
Affected: European users
When: Checkout with credit cards
Since: March deploy
Status: Investigating

scenarios.test_question: Can you describe the full scope of the checkout bug?
scenarios.expected_answer: European users, checkout, credit cards, started after March deploy

scenarios.name: Contradiction Resolution
scenarios.description: Agent received conflicting info, needs to identify and resolve

accumulated_context: Day 1: Max file size is 10MB
Day 3: Actually, max file size is 50MB for premium users
Day 5: We changed it back to 10MB for everyone
Day 7: Final decision: 10MB free, 100MB premium

scenarios.compact_summary: File size limits were discussed multiple times.

avm_stored./config/file_limits.md:
FINAL (Day 7): Free users: 10MB, Premium users: 100MB
History: Changed multiple times, this is the authoritative value

scenarios.test_question: What's the current file size limit for premium users?
